The '''''Raider''''' was a [[Gladius-class light freighter|''Gladius''-class light freighter]] owned by [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith Acolyte]] [[Jor Torlin]], an agent of [[Sith Intelligence and Assassination]]. He took it to [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] in [[137 ABY]] as part of his mission to capture [[Cade Skywalker]]. [[Morrigan Corde]] overpowered Torlin, taking them to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] where she killed him, before leaving in the ''Raider''.

The [[138 ABY|next year]], after [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] Calixte was exposed as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for [[Roan Fel]] and believed dead, she fled [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] aboard the ''Raider'' and used the ship to get to the Wheel.

{{Ship-stub}}
